reason_for_decision: The article clears the pass bar by treating fusion as a staged design process with normalization, correlation, uncertainty handling, and auditability rather than as a vague platform promise.
strengths: The article is strong on normalization and on preserving intermediate reasoning instead of collapsing everything into one icon.
Its sections on contradictory inputs, source ownership, and latency budgets give it real engineering depth.
The operator feedback and auditability guidance make the piece useful beyond initial deployment.
summary_assessment: This is a high-quality pass. The article offers strong system-design value and keeps fusion tied to actionability and operator trust.
